title: Mumbai、Maharashtra — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Mumbai、Maharashtra的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Mumbai是Maharashtra的一个城市，人口约20,961,000。India’s financial capital and largest city, home to Bollywood, the Bombay Stock Exchange, and a vibrant coastal urban culture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
